name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: Los Angeles, CA — ACE Cash Express at 6214 S Vermont Ave offers same-day payday loans and title loans.
description_long:
ACE Cash Express is located at 6214 S Vermont Ave in Los Angeles, CA, serving the South LA neighborhood as a standalone storefront. This Los Angeles location provides quick access to financial services with convenient hours: Monday through Friday 9 AM to 7 PM, Saturday 9 AM to 5 PM, and closed Sundays. The South Los Angeles area benefits from accessible street parking at this location.

At this Los Angeles location on Vermont Ave, ACE Cash Express offers same-day payday loans, title loans, and check cashing services. Whether you need immediate cash for unexpected expenses or are considering a title loan against your vehicle, the staff at 6214 S Vermont Ave can explain loan terms and requirements. Call +1 323-789-4990 to speak with someone at this location about your specific needs.

If you're a Los Angeles resident or working in the area, this ACE Cash Express location is convenient for payday loans when other options aren't available. Bring valid photo ID and proof of income for the fastest application process. Unlike online lenders, ACE offers in-person service with transparent fee and interest discussions.
address: 6214 S Vermont Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90044

company_info.headquarters: 6214 S Vermont Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90044

pros: Wide service range under one roof: loans, check cashing, money transfers, bill pay, cards, and tax services
Offers both in-store and online loan options, providing flexibility of access
Separate dedicated customer service lines for general inquiries vs. online loans
Tax preparation services available — less common among check-cashing providers
Porte banking/card product available for customers seeking an account alternative
Business services offered for small business customers beyond consumer products
Physical store locations in multiple states with a store locator tool
cons: Title loans carry risk of vehicle repossession and are among the highest-cost loan products available
Loan products are not available in all states, limiting access depending on location
Location-specific web pages return 404 errors, making it difficult to verify services at a specific store online
An outdated Hurricane Ida store closure notice remains on the site, indicating inconsistent website maintenance
No pricing, fee schedules, or APR ranges are visible in the provided website content
best_for: Underbanked consumers who need check cashing plus other financial services in one visit
Consumers needing a short-term installment loan with a physical location they can walk into
Individuals needing money transfers or bill payment without a traditional bank account
Small business owners needing business financial services outside of traditional banking
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express suits underbanked consumers who need multiple financial services — check cashing, short-term loans, money transfers — handled at a single physical location or online. The main caveat is that title loans and installment loans from alternative lenders like ACE are high-cost products, and consumers should carefully review fees and APRs before borrowing, as costs can be significantly higher than traditional credit options.
meta_description: Los Angeles, CA payday loans — ACE Cash Express at 6214 S Vermont Ave offers same-day cash advances.
